abilities.name: Bak'al's Grasp
abilities.description: When you cast @node-warrior #War Scream#, you enter @node-red #Corrupted#. You can't be #Healed# by anything during this phase. The more #HP# you lose the more #Damage# you deal.

abilities.name: Blood Pact
abilities.description: When you run out of @icon-mana #Mana#. Your spells will start using your #HP# instead. Be careful as if your health is too low you might have the chance of getting 1-shot.

abilities.name: Armor Breaker
abilities.description: When at #40% @node-red Corrupted# you will receive a #30%# damage boost on your next @node-warrior #Uppercut# for #8s# and has a cooldown of #16s#

abilities.name: Intoxicating Blood
abilities.description: Exiting @node-red #Corrupted# will give you #2.5% HP# for damage dealt and enemies killed during @node-red #Corrupted#.

abilities.name: Exhilarate
abilities.description: Exiting @node-red #Corrupted# will heal you for #30%# of your Max HP.

aspects.name: Fallen's Embodiment of Blind Fury
aspects.description: Reduces @node-red #Blood Pact's# HP costs, almost required.
